name: Marinated Gingered Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb frozen shrimp, shelled and deveined
2 tbsp sweet sake or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook shrimp as directed on package; drain.
2. Arrange shrimp in a single layer in a glass or plastic container, 12x7 1/2 x 2 inches.
3. Heat soy sauce to boiling; add gingerroot.
4. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered until most of the liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in vinegar, sugar, sake (or dry sherry), and salt; pour over shrimp.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
7. Remove shrimp from marinade with a slotted spoon; arrange on a serving plate.
8. Garnish with green onion.
60 to 65 Shrimp.
